description: E-Series SSD Cache - Capacity and Performance

panels.title: Important Information about SSD Cache dashboard

options.content: This dashboard is only available from SANtricity OS 12.00+.

panels.description: Overall SSD cache hit percentage (full cache hits / total read+write ops).
panels.title: Top $TopResources Cache Hit %

panels.description: Percentage of SSD cache capacity currently allocated.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Cache Allocation %

panels.description: Percentage of allocated SSD cache that is actively used (populated dirty / allocated).
panels.title: Top $TopResources Cache Utilization %

panels.description: SSD cache configuration and capacity summary per array.

targets.expr:
label_join(
  eseries_ssd_cache_labels{array=~"$Array",datacenter=~"$Datacenter"},
  "unique_id",
  "-",
  "datacenter",
  "array",
  "ssd_cache_id"
)

label_join(
  eseries_ssd_cache_current_capacity{array=~"$Array",datacenter=~"$Datacenter"},
  "unique_id",
  "-",
  "datacenter",
  "array",
  "ssd_cache_id"
)

label_join(
  eseries_ssd_cache_max_capacity{array=~"$Array",datacenter=~"$Datacenter"},
  "unique_id",
  "-",
  "datacenter",
  "array",
  "ssd_cache_id"
)

label_join(
  eseries_ssd_cache_additional_capacity{array=~"$Array",datacenter=~"$Datacenter"},
  "unique_id",
  "-",
  "datacenter",
  "array",
  "ssd_cache_id"
)

panels.title: SSD Cache Overview

panels.description: Maximum SSD cache capacity allowed per array.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Maximum Capacity Allowed

panels.description: SSD cache current capacity over time.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Current Capacity

panels.description: Additional SSD cache capacity that can still be added per array.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Additional Capacity Allowed

panels.description: SSD cache allocated size.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Allocated Size

panels.description: SSD cache available (free) size.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Available Size

panels.description: Percentage of SSD cache capacity that is allocated.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Allocation %

panels.description: Percentage of allocated SSD cache that is actually populated with data.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Utilization %

panels.description: SSD drives contributing to the cache, with raw capacity per drive.

targets.expr:
label_join(
  eseries_ssd_cache_drive_labels{array=~"$Array",datacenter=~"$Datacenter"},
  "unique_id",
  "-",
  "datacenter",
  "array",
  "ssd_cache",
  "ssd_cache_id",
  "drive"
)

label_join(
  eseries_ssd_cache_drive_raw_capacity{array=~"$Array",datacenter=~"$Datacenter"},
  "unique_id",
  "-",
  "datacenter",
  "array",
  "ssd_cache",
  "ssd_cache_id",
  "drive"
)

panels.title: SSD Cache Drives

panels.description: Volumes that are cached by the SSD cache.

targets.expr: eseries_ssd_cache_volume_labels{array=~"$Array",datacenter=~"$Datacenter"}

panels.title: Cached Volumes

panels.description: Full cache hits as a percentage of total read+write operations.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Cache Hit %

panels.description: Full cache hits as a percentage of read operations.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Full Cache Hit %

panels.description: Partial cache hits as a percentage of read operations.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Partial Cache Hit %

panels.description: Complete cache misses as a percentage of read operations.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Complete Cache Miss %

panels.description: SSD cache read operations per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Read IOPS

panels.description: SSD cache write operations per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Write IOPS

panels.description: Full cache hit operations per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Full Cache Hit IOPS

panels.description: Partial cache hit operations per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Partial Cache Hit IOPS

panels.description: Complete cache miss operations per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Cache Miss IOPS

panels.description: Populate-on-read operations per second: cache misses that trigger an SSD cache fill from disk.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Populate-on-Read IOPS

panels.description: Populate-on-write operations per second: write IOs that also fill in the SSD cache.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Populate-on-Write IOPS

panels.description: Read block operations (cache block reads) per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Read Block Ops/s

panels.description: Write block operations (cache block writes) per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Write Block Ops/s

panels.description: Full cache hit block operations per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Full Cache Hit Block Ops/s

panels.description: Partial cache hit block operations per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Partial Cache Hit Block Ops/s

panels.description: Complete cache miss block operations per second per controller.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Cache Miss Block Ops/s

panels.description: Cache clean population (valid cached data not yet written back to disk).
panels.title: Top $TopResources Populated Clean Size

panels.description: Cache dirty population (modified data in cache not yet flushed to disk).
panels.title: Top $TopResources Populated Dirty Size

panels.description: Cache invalidate operations per second: cache blocks explicitly invalidated.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Invalidate Ops/s

panels.description: Cache recycle operations per second: cache blocks recycled/evicted to free space.
panels.title: Top $TopResources Recycle Ops/s

title: E-Series: SSD Cache
